moments.title: World Cup Semi-Final Day
moments.blurb: Today sees the second 2026 FIFA World Cup semi-final, with England or Argentina vying for a spot in Sunday's final against Spain.

angles.name: Match Day Hype
angles.copy: It's Semi-Final Day at the FIFA World Cup! England or Argentina? Who joins Spain in Sunday's final? Get ready for a huge one!

angles.name: Local Excitement
angles.copy: Who are you backing in today's World Cup semi-final? The tension is building across Wales as we await the clash that decides Sunday's finalist!

moments.title: The Open Championship Tees Off
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins tomorrow, July 16th, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England, running until Sunday.

angles.name: Golf Major Kicks Off
angles.copy: Major golf action returns! The Open Championship tees off tomorrow at Royal Birkdale. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: UK Golf Focus
angles.copy: All eyes on Royal Birkdale from tomorrow as The Open Championship gets underway. The biggest names in golf are in England for the 154th Open!

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival kicks off today in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, Scotland, running until July 18th.

angles.name: Festival Kicks Off
angles.copy: HebCelt is ON! The Hebridean Celtic Festival starts today in Stornoway – four days of incredible music and culture in the Outer Hebrides!

angles.name: Scottish Festival Vibe
angles.copy: Stornoway is buzzing! The Hebridean Celtic Festival brings its unique blend of music and atmosphere to the Outer Hebrides from today. Are you there?

moments.title: Buddhafield Festival Underway
moments.blurb: Buddhafield Festival, a celebration of community and connection, starts today and runs until July 19th.

angles.name: Mindful Festival Start
angles.copy: Buddhafield Festival begins today! If you're looking for community, connection, and good vibes, it's all happening until Sunday.

moments.title: Luke Combs Tribute in Swansea
moments.blurb: A Luke Combs UK tribute act is performing in Swansea on Friday, July 17th.

angles.name: Country Night Swansea
angles.copy: Calling all country fans in Swansea! A Luke Combs UK tribute is hitting the stage this Friday. Get ready to sing along!

angles.name: Local Tribute Act
angles.copy: Yee-haw! Catch the Luke Combs UK tribute act in Swansea this Friday, July 17th. Perfect for a country-themed night out!

moments.title: BINGO LINGO in Cardiff
moments.blurb: Popular event BINGO LINGO is happening at Tiger Yard in Cardiff on Friday, July 17th.

angles.name: Cardiff Night Out
angles.copy: Cardiff! BINGO LINGO is back at Tiger Yard this Friday. Expect wild fun, big prizes, and a night of pure entertainment!

angles.name: Weekend Plans
angles.copy: Looking for weekend plans in Cardiff? BINGO LINGO is hitting Tiger Yard on Friday, July 17th. Who's ready to shout 'House!'?

moments.title: New UK Singles Chart
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart will be updated with the latest Top 40 on Friday, July 17th.

angles.name: Chart Countdown Anticipation
angles.copy: New music Friday means a new Official UK Singles Chart! Who do you think will be at Number 1 this week? Find out Friday!

angles.name: Weekend Playlist Prep
angles.copy: Get ready to update your playlists! The new UK Singles Chart drops on Friday. Any predictions for the biggest tracks?

moments.title: Splendour Festival Nottingham
moments.blurb: Splendour Festival, Nottinghamshire's biggest festival, takes place this weekend, July 18-19, at Wollaton Hall & Deer Park.

angles.name: Nottingham Festival Hype
angles.copy: Nottingham, are you ready? Splendour Festival is this weekend, bringing five stages of music to Wollaton Hall! Who are you seeing?

moments.title: FIFA World Cup Final
moments.blurb: The 2026 FIFA World Cup culminates this Sunday, July 19th, with the final match held at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey.

angles.name: World Cup Final Countdown
angles.copy: The biggest game in football is just days away! The FIFA World Cup Final kicks off this Sunday. Who will lift the trophy?

angles.name: Sunday Showdown
angles.copy: Get ready for the ultimate football showdown! This Sunday is the FIFA World Cup Final. Make your predictions now!

moments.title: Brian May's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Queen guitarist and rock icon Brian May turns 79 on Sunday, July 19th.

angles.name: Rock Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Queen guitarist, Brian May, this Sunday! What's your favourite Queen track?

angles.name: Guitar Icon
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to the one and only Brian May, who turns 79 on Sunday! A true guitar icon.

moments.title: Fred again..'s 33rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Award-winning UK producer and DJ Fred again.. celebrates his 33rd birthday on Sunday, July 19th.

angles.name: Dance Star Birthday
angles.copy: Massive Happy 33rd Birthday to the incredible Fred again.. this Sunday! What's your favourite track from him?

angles.name: UK Producer
angles.copy: Celebrating Fred again..'s 33rd birthday on Sunday! The UK's hottest producer and DJ continues to dominate the dance scene.

moments.title: Carlos Santana's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana turns 79 on Monday, July 20th.

angles.name: Guitar God Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Carlos Santana on Monday! His guitar riffs are timeless. What's your favourite Santana song?

moments.title: Yusuf Islam (Cat Stevens) 78th Birthday
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Yusuf Islam, formerly known as Cat Stevens, celebrates his 78th birthday on Tuesday, July 21st.

angles.name: Folk Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 78th Birthday to the brilliant Yusuf Islam (Cat Stevens) on Tuesday! His music still resonates with so many.

moments.title: Don Henley's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Eagles co-founder and singer-songwriter Don Henley turns 79 on Wednesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Don Henley this Wednesday! What's your favourite Eagles track featuring his iconic vocals?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Next Week
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23rd to 26th, celebrating its 20th anniversary.

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: Only a week until Latitude Festival kicks off in Suffolk! Who's heading to Henham Park for the 20th anniversary celebrations?

moments.title: WOMAD Festival Approaches
moments.blurb: The World's Festival, WOMAD, takes place from July 23rd to 26th at Neston Park, Wiltshire, celebrating global arts, dance, food, and culture.

angles.name: Global Culture Festival
angles.copy: WOMAD Festival is just around the corner! Get ready for a world of music, dance, and culture at Neston Park, Wiltshire, from July 23-26.

moments.title: Slash's 61st Birthday
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses guitar legend Slash celebrates his 61st birthday on Thursday, July 23rd.

angles.name: Rock Guitar Hero Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to the one and only Slash this Thursday! What's your favourite riff from the Guns N' Roses icon?

moments.title: Wales Airshow Swansea
moments.blurb: The spectacular Wales Airshow returns to Swansea Bay on July 25th and 26th, featuring thrilling aerial displays.

angles.name: Airshow Excitement
angles.copy: Get ready to look up, Swansea! The Wales Airshow is just days away, bringing incredible aerial displays to Swansea Bay this weekend, July 25-26!

angles.name: Weekend Plans Wales
angles.copy: Planning your weekend in Wales? The Wales Airshow lands in Swansea Bay this Saturday and Sunday! Don't miss the breathtaking displays.
